expected_path_note: SC1=N -> SC2=Y -> SC3=Y (exactly 25% - boundary) -> set_flag -> final=N -> siap
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 04 – Exactly Twenty Five Percent Co-Owner Venezuela Grid Contractor
activities: Joaquin Herrera owns exactly 25% — one quarter, as recorded in the commercial register — of Electrored Caracas C.A., a contractor that erects transmission lines and substations for Venezuela's national electricity corporation under contracts with the central government in Caracas, which account for about 75% of the company's revenues. He has no management role and no board seat; the stake is his only connection, and he holds it today.
origin_of_assets: Proceeds of a family business sale, partly reinvested in Electrored Caracas C.A.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Includes the 25% participation in Electrored Caracas C.A.
